user.title: Configure MediaMTX
user.description: Enter the full url and port of your MediaMTX instance.

data.service_id: ID/alias for this service. Use this to reference in custom cards
data.auth_method: none=no authentication, pass-thru=Same authorization header as home assistant, basic=username+password

error.invalid_url: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
error.invalid_id: Please enter a valid ID for this service. No spaces or special characters allowed
